reviews.review_text: I'm giving it 4 stars because the place was very nice, the people who worked there were friendly except for the older woman at reception who treated us very badly many times, perhaps because we are Latinos, anyway, everything else was excellent! :)
Super cool experience

Stayed in a cabin there, cabins are well layer out, furnished and thought out well. Concrete roads, green grass and a well thought out park. Pool was cold only one section heated as such. Plenty of wildlife and quiet neighbours, overall a great place to stay.

On arrival the team at reception were lovely,,friendly and very helpful.thr room was amazing and clean. On a sad note the male that was working in the cafe has zero customer service skills, couldn't even acknowledge partons standing in front of him waiting to get acknowledged and place an order we left without him even getting anything and no acknowledgement at all, won't be going back there

May I suggest in future, that the reception staff OFFER the use of their tractor WHEN CHECKING IN, to help make parking a large caravan a little easier IF REQUIRED.
I made that comment to the office this morning and I was pretty much told "WHY DIDN'T YOU ASK?"
Well - how did I know there was one available if it wasn't offered.
All part of the Ingenia service??? No???

Service was great. They placed our 2 families next to each other despite initial hiccup in the booking. Amenities at the site were fun for the the kids. Only thing is the room/cabin was a bit dated, and the dining ware was not perfectly clean from the handover.
Just one air-conditioned for whole cabin , but ceiling fan and stand fan supply, can't imagine summer time, I like the cookingware. Location good if selfdrive
Very nice place and helpful staff Had a great time with the family

Loved my stay here! We got a power on suite site. Bathroom very well equiped, tidy and clean. Pool is great for kids of all ages and the cafe is a real lifesaver. Staff is very helpful and nice and communication was great. Definitely will be back here.

We stayed for three nights at Middle Rock Caravan Park in One Mile. My cabin was number 38.

I understand that this is a caravan park but basic cleanliness should never be compromised. I paid over $800 for three nights and felt like I was living in squalor.

The toilet had clearly not been cleaned. There was urine and faeces in the hinges, down the sides and underneath the seat and the lid was broken. When I reported it to reception, I was told someone would come ASAP. A staff member did attend however she left a dirty rag on top of the toilet and the bathroom was still unclean. I ended up going to Aldi to buy cleaning products and cleaned it myself. I should not have to clean a bathroom while on holiday.
What was even more disgusting was the brush holder for the toilet. There was literal poo caked on and when you took the brush off the entire room stank. I could not stop gagging.

The shower had visible scum buildup along the base, mould throughout and broken sections. After spraying and scrubbing it myself, the grime came off easily, which shows it simply hadn’t been cleaned properly.

The floors felt filthy. When getting into bed, it felt like there were layers of dirt on our feet. We attempted to mop the next morning but the mop itself was covered in mould, so I used my own wipes and towels instead. The amount of dirt that came up was shocking. We were travelling with our 7 month-old baby who is crawling and we could not let her on the floor because it was simply too dirty.

The rangehood was greasy and there were oil splatters on the walls. There were also dead flies and ants on the floor when we arrived. The spare sheets had sand on them. When I moved the bed to fit my baby’s cot, there was a significant build-up of dirt underneath along with a pair of underwear left behind.

I requested an upgrade but was told the park was full. The only compensation offered was one night refunded. Due to the condition of the cabin, we will not be returning.

What made it more frustrating was that other family members staying in different cabins had no cleanliness issues — only minor things like a toilet door not locking or uncomfortable beds.

The pool area and café were nice, although the café appeared understaffed with around a 15-minute wait just to be served. The jumping pillow was flat and there was stagnant water underneath it. I also booked partly because the website advertised a playground, but upon arrival it had been removed.

This park has a lot of potential but the management of cleanliness and maintenance needs serious improvement. Unfortunately, I would not recommend staying here based on our experience.

We had a lovely stay. The location is great - close to one mile beach and just a short drive from port Stephen attractions. Park has lots of facilities to keep everyone entertained, from resort style pools and bbq areas and playground for the kids. It’s perfect for a family gateway.
Best Ingenia we’ve been to! We had an ensuite camping and the facilities were amazing. Loved the access to the beach. Incredible place and can’t wait to come back!

We had a great stay in an unpowered site and ended up extending our stay by 2 nights. The staff were super friendly and helpful, and the park is beautiful, surrounded by nature and we even got a visit from a monitor lizard. Great location, would definitely recommend.

The villa we stayed at needed a little work and maintenance. The shower head had a leaking point that spat out water when turned on. The villa wasn’t the cleanest. Some of the dishes were dirty. The rangehood needed a deep clean. There was a lot of scuff marks and some holes in the walls. The walkway to the beach wasn’t really friendly for kids. We liked the pool and the jumping pillow for the kids. The cafe closed at 2pm on a Sunday which was a shame as we wanted to go in as it was raining. Overall, I think it was an okay stay, family friendly and very close drive to Nelson bay. I would recommend booking the modern / renovated rooms.

A little confusion booking through Airbnb  because of the wrong address advertised initially &poor Optus reception & a text message after already arriving at one mile instead of middle rock site, but other than that, was a nice stay with a nice clean air con& all the creature comforts a human needs, wouldn't pay what they are asking as a weekend rate tho
Nice and peaceful place, bit of a walk to the beach but the staff are very helpful.

Our family had a wonderful stay at Ingenia Middle Rock. Staff at the reception was lovely and everyone working here was amazing!  I originally booked a studio cabin but was upgraded to a two bedder cabin- thank you!
Best part was the Pool, My Kids can’t get enough of the heated one.
I just wish there is a playground inside tho otherwise it’s all good! We are definitely coming back!

Enjoyed a two night camping stay in the unpowered sites at the back of the park.
The park is kept in great condition, the amenities and cafe are first class.
4wd access beside the park to Samurai beach is easily accessible.
This is a perfect park for a getaway with children.

Very expensive for what you get. Stayed on a powered site. Unfortunately, unlike most parks we have experienced across Australia (and there has been dozens), they don't have someone walking the park at night to keep the peace. So there were big kids running around after 930pm screaming outside our caravan windows playing hide and seek, with torches. And people staying up every night past midnight being loud and obnoxious. We didn't sleep very well at all.
No park for kids just sandpit disapointing when you have a 2 and 3 year old expecting a swing like every other caravan park

Tight caravan sites with one way access through park.
Our visit was impacted by a sour ground staff member.
Toilet conditions were poor with fixtures broke or in old condition.

Kids riding bikes and e-scooters late into the night creating lots of noise.

Great pool
Cafe food prices were Expensive.

Unfortunately I’ll Be looking elsewhere in the future.
The experience was okay, but the bed and pillow were not comfortable at all, especially for people who suffer from back pain.

We had a fantastic stay at Ingenia Holiday Park Middle Rock.

The service was great, and the location is perfect; a short drive from plenty of activities and close to the beach. It was a nice, quiet and relaxing holiday, exactly what we were looking for.

The staff were friendly, upbeat and welcoming, which made the experience even better. The park has excellent facilities, including a water park, playgrounds for kids, and a convenient on-site cafe.

We stayed in a spa cabin and absolutely loved it. The shower had amazing water pressure, the beds were very comfortable and the cabin was clean and well maintained.

Highly recommend Ingenia Middle Rock for a relaxing and enjoyable getaway!
Very friendly and helpful staff, clean and well kept services

Pros:
- grassy shady unpowered sites.
- dog friendly
- easy access into Fingal bay/shoal bay if you can’t get a stay in town.
- wifi access
- bar, cafe, pool for kids,
- shower water hot with good pressure
- big screen TV with tables and chairs to watch cricket or telly
- activities like food trucks, wildlife shows, wine tasting pop up in the park
- customer service from the front desk ladies is 10/10 - I couldn’t not fault them as they were friendly and supportive

Cons:
- camp kitchen only has 1 sink, so you end up lining up for a while.
- bathrooms constantly dirty and full of sand due to high number of foot traffic (not cleaners fault)- just so many people at this park that you can’t possibly keep amenities clean
- noise at night is not addressed. Text messages to campers is not enough to stop kids, and people screaming and partying at midnight. Security needs to actually walk around and address this.
- very long walk to beach through bush

Put it simply: this is a party caravan park which is far too large for the current amenities  available. Whilst it is great for kids, we Probably wouldn’t stay again if we could get a park closer to the beaches/bays
Excellent customer service by the ladies at reception during peak season. The amenities also exceeded my expectations for a camping site - clean and well equipped.
we booked a campsite and it was pretty good .
整體達到預期。是一個營地區，有不同的小屋，可以把營車駛進去，營內很多設施，由於我們早出晚歸，這這所以沒有好好享受設施，尤其是泳池，我們根本冇時間。￼ 如果人多就非常化算。地理位置也很好，不用10分鐘就有一間超市，方便買東西。10分鐘左右就到海灘，有騎駱駝，滑沙和坐四驅車。
Sites are very wide but not overly long, plenty of luscious green grass. Facilities are clean, staff are wonderful.
Welcoming staff, very kids-friendly with fun activities, and only a short drive to the beautiful One Mile Beach.
Sites expensive compared to others we go to normally.

Had a lovely two night stay staff were friendly we had issues with the tv and when raised was promptly assisted to get it working again. We stayed in the Parkview cabin which was very nice for a cabin and clean plenty of kitchen utensils and a short walk to the beach.

We absolutely loved our 1 night stay in the Studio Cabin (perfect for couples or families as there is a double bed and a bunk bed)! The cabin was so cosy and had everything we needed! We didn't expect the kitchen to have pans, cutting boards and so many kitchen utensils, so very grateful for that when making breakfast in the morning. The cabin also had a small tv and cd player (we brought our own cd movies with us to watch in the evening - definitely recommend)! The bathroom was very clean and had no issues with the shower - shampoo, conditioner and soap was provided, along with towels! The cabin was very clean as well, I couldn't fault it! The site was incredible, we used the bbq facilities and the pool, both were clean and great to use. The pool also had some pool balls to play with and a volleyball net over the pool! Oh - you also have a parking spot for your car right next to your cabin (as you can see in my photo) - very handy for bringing in bags easily into the cabin. Definitely a site that we will return to, cosy and convenient, made the stay feel truely relaxing! Thank you Ingenia!
Great location, awesome pool, rooms were great, and the service at the middle Rock cafe was amazing a big thank you to Jack and Liva who were very helpful.
The Cafe was great ! We had a group of 21 and had brekky two mornings in a row. Food and staff lovely. Thanks Ingenia Middle Rock

Pretty good place to stay with the kids
Except just one problem there’s like lots of sticks and twigs that my kid has fell off his bike a few times
But a good place overall
Caravan park sites are nice and amenities were nice and clean. Heated spa seemed to be the favourite for all.

Loved this place.  Erroneously booked the wrong dates,but the office was accomodating to assist with a last minute booking at the doors.. park was lovely.. family safe, camping area was awesome, rooms were awesome, beach access is a small little trek, but worth it...will visit again...super close to 4wd samurai beach...
Very nice place to stay

I’ve in the past given 5 stars as we have been coming here for a couple of years now and always thoroughly enjoyed ourselves, however it’s recently become very disappointing…
We had our usual powered site that I book for the October long weekend this year, we have come at Easter and June long weekends previously also, we have never caused any trouble, never had to be spoken to by staff or security for anything whatsoever other than positives or general conversation.
This time on our first night, the sun had just began to set, and kids/teenagers were all still riding their bikes and scooters around - our 8 yr old girl being one of them, she was just riding her scooter in front of our van by herself as it seems that was what everyone else was doing.
Suddenly, a man walked over and he had a big dog on a leash, aggressively asked us and the ppl on the site next to us “WHO DOES THIS KID BELONG TO???” My husband and I said she was ours, to which he then began to have a massive go at us and our daughter saying she can’t be on her scooter, he was so aggressive that our daughter dropped her scooter and ran inside our van balling her eyes out (she is not the kind of kid that gets in trouble and is always trying to do the right thing). He continued to scold us like we were children ourselves, and it took us a little while to realise this guy was actually security. He eventually walked away, the ppl on the site next to us even commented how aggressive he was. We left it at that.
For the next half an hour, our daughter had to sit there after being abused by a grown man, and watch the same large groups of kids and teens ride their bikes and scooters around in the dark, the security was nowhere to be seen since he had abused us, he clearly didn’t go and tell the rest of the ppl in the park to follow after dark rules.
I decided to go for a walk, and funny enough, right out the front of the entrance boom gate, there’s Mr Security with his dog having a cigarette on the job.
I approached him and said that I suggest if he is going to make a little girl cry by telling her that she needs to get off her scooter at sunset, that he go around and tell the rest of the kids that she has to sit and watch still ride around after dark. He walked back into the park - he did at this point end up telling groups to get off their bikes and scooters, but only because I insisted that it’s only fair to enforce rules to everyone, not just selected ppl and kids.
He then ended up out the front of our van where I said “thanks for doing the right thing in the end, again it’s only fair don’t you think”
This resulted in an argument with him again being aggressive with plenty of witnesses, I said if he continued I would make a formal complaint and he responded with that he will be making a complaint about me and that the security cameras will show I attacked him out the front - I reminded him he maybe should have been doing his job rather than standing outside the park near the main road. There were no further issues for us for the rest of our stay, however we witnessed this guy upset a number of their ppl within the park who didn’t appear to be doing anything really worrisome at the time. It seemed he was just picking ppl to push his power trip ego on to.

My problem is, at the end of our stay, I attempted to rebook the site for next year like I always do, and the staff in the office for the first time ever said they hadn’t released the rates yet for next year and they will put me down as a booking and I will receive a confirmation email once rates are released.
A few weeks passed, so I called the park to see if they had released rates yet - I was told not yet and I will hear once bookings open.
We have since heard by other ppl we know that stay there that they have been able to book and secure their spots - but when I call I’m still told that the bookings are not open yet - I can’t help but think that this abusive security guard had something to do with it. Sad, considering we’ve never had any issues prior - we are not the problem!

We have booked for next year again. The bottlebrush cabin I think it was, was truely amazing! Best I have stayed in for any cabins and we have stayed in a lot. Had good facilities for the kids, pool jumping pillow. The pool was nice to have cafe attached but it isn’t open long hours nor everyday which was a bit annoying. Also couple of negative was the tv remotes had to be replaced as they don’t work, and the gas bottle was empty for our first night but housekeeping did come fast and replace it.

Haven’t enjoyed it. Site is on a slope. Visitor facilities and permanent van sites not maintained.  Absolutely nothing being done about 10pm “quiet time” and no response from office when enquiry was made about the issue. Won’t be back.

We have a 22ft van & stayed on a Ensuite site, luckily they had a tractor to get put it into position due to the work being done adjacent to site, hooking back up & leaving was fine. They have a Pool & a bar, jumping bag thingy, hot food, its a bit of a stroll thru the sand dune to get to the beach but we'll worth it. Just be careful as seen a red belly black & a good size one at that on the track, see video attached. We enjoyed our time here @ this friendly park would of liked to stay longer as there are plenty of places nearby to check out as well.

Amazing great for couples or families
Great amenities awesome pool
Britny and her colleagues have looked after us during our stay in Ingenia. Definitely coming back to stay again, such a wonderful place.
Service was awesome and allowed us to stay further for checkout. Britney was really helpful.

Stayed 4 nights. Nice pool and rooms. Right near a beach trail. Staff was amazing (especially this one girl who helped me out by telling my kids they had behaved so well that we could have an additional 2 nights). Bring a chromecast.

What a lovely holiday park! So well thought out. Clean, modern amenities and plenty for the kids to do. The unpowered sites are very reasonably priced, some of them separated by plants and bollards and there's a well equipped camp kitchen. The beach is about 400m away along a sandy path with plenty of wildlife and the holiday park is dog friendly (seasonal). There is a pool and cafe too. Highly recommended.
Nice spot for a couple of nights, but don't forget the repellent.

Had a great weekend with the family. It was very windy, but many of the sites are somewhat protected. Kids loved the heated pool and it was quite a nice break from the wind where it is located.

Cafe for food and barista coffee (if you don't have access to a decent coffee machine) which is always a welcome luxury when camping.

Kids loved the Possums and Kookaburras
Very relaxing and child-friendly
Lovely park,  quiet at this time of year. Good clean amenities.

Highly recommended! We’ve stayed in many cabin houses at caravan parks, but this one was by far the cleanest and most modern. Everything was in perfect working order, and the showers had great water pressure. The only issue we noticed was that after one person showered, there didn’t seem to be hot water left for the next—possibly just a minor glitch. The park also offers beach access at the back (we couldn’t explore due to time constraints) and a heated pool available from 9–5, which is an excellent facility. Customer service was great too—staff were friendly and polite.

Nice place, it’s a trek to the beach but it’s really nice once you get there. Nice park. Water was shut off for half an hour, it went cold while I was in shower when I got out I had receive a txt water would be shut off between 9-9.30. Went to the pool and a whole heap of workers were sitting up on the balcony looking down on us so that was weird. Not overly friendly the staff.. received a txt the night before we were leaving offering 4 pm checkout for 50 so that was nice. Did that and just assumed the money had been taken out of my account. Got a rude phone call at 2pm the next day asking for the money wich I then paid over the phone, just to checkout at 3.45 and them accusing me of not paying lol. Then they said oh sorry we had the wrong cabin number lol. Also streets absolutely full of massive pot holes everywhere you go in streets around the park. Other than that was good but wouldn’t return. :)

Loved staying here for the weekend.
Our favorite was the walk access to the beach, a walk through the dunes (10 -15 minutes with kids).
Clean tidy and comfortable, we were so pleased and happy to come back!
酒店非常適合一家大細入住，有廚房用品及爐具，煮食非常方便，開車到超市10分鐘內，下次再来必定首選

We stayed over two night on 7-8 Aug 2025 having previously booked a number of months earlier as part of our trip from Queensland south. We received an upgrade to a three bedroom villa which was huge and beyond our expectations. It had two queen size beds and four double bunks so could easily cater for two couples and kids. The kitchen was well equipped with everything you would expect from a share house with a large fridge, full oven and gas hotplates. There was a small BBQ on the deck and parking large enough for my Ford Raptor was right at the front door although it is tight to get it out of there. There was a really large bathroom including toilet with instantaneous hot water so you will never run out of hot water. Another toilet is located behind the door in the laundry which I thought was a great touch. The park was far from full while we were there and most cabins were vacant. It is very quiet. The local shops are about 5km away and everything is there you would require. Overall we found the park to be great and would not hesitate to recommend a stay here.

This was the second time we came here. Great place! The staff were amazing they were nice enough to give us a late checkout which we really appreciated! Clean and well maintained. Will definitely come back here again!
Spent 3 weeks here. Friendly staff and clean facilities. Licenced Cafe is great for coffee and a meal
Excellent Stay, High Quality Cabins, Pool and Cafe with great beach access.

Fantastic place to stay. We've been here each year for the Port Stephens Triathlon, and never been disappointed. The cabins are great, maintenance man was quick to resolve issues, and it's a short bike ride from the race start at One Mile Beach.
Salamander Bay shops are not far away if that's your thing. Valhalla Restaurant for a unique pizza experience, as well as nice cafes in Nelson Bay and Fingal Bay.
The Koala Sanctuary next door is well worth a visit, especially if you have kids.
Also worth noting, given the recent flooding... the One Mile Beach holiday park had huge puddles, but Middle Rock was unaffected.

We cannot thank the management and staff enough at ingenia middle rock.    The parks amenities are kept immaculate at all times, with cleaning taking place at least twice daily.   The location of the park is second to none with just a short and pleasant walk to the pristine seven mile beach.   The pool area and cafe as well as the laundry facilities made our stay so comfortable and memorable.   The whole of port Stephen’s is at your doorstep and there is an abundance of nature and retail within easy distance.     The management snd staff at ingenia middle rock supported us throughout every step of our stay whilst we were building our home and we appreciate their kindness and flexibility greatly.    We are looking forward to returning to our tent at middle rock for many many more great holidays to come.
Lovely place to stay, easy to walk to the beach, beautiful sunrise from here. Clean, quiet cabins, friendly staff
Rooms are very spacious and clean. Staff are very friendly and helpful. There are lots of play area. Swimming pool is the best. Easily accessible to the beach. Wifi is slightly slow.

The park is great! 10 min walk to the beach via a track, however well worth it for slightly older kids.|Good facilities although not cleaned anywhere near enough.|Lots of interesting wildlife who are used to people - lace monitors, ducks, possums, kookaburras which will let you get super close.|Kitchens have all the power points locked sooo if you want to plug something in, BYO power source.|Staff are great, until you need help from falling trees, monsoon rains and/or bad weather.|People are left to their own devices with fires which is also scary to watch!|Real potential for a novice with fires to cause some serious damage and safety risk to other guests.|They don’t bother to check on anyone or render assistance when needed even when asked for help in horrific weather.|Sadly we were the only ones actively helping people who’s tents had collapsed - one younger reception staff member RUINED it for all the super friendly and kind staff the park had.|Shout out to the cafe staff who did an amazing job being kind, gentle and friendly at a time the guests needed a smiling face and some kindness.|Park floods badly, cars and vans bogged everywhere and the staffs response is “stay safe” we can’t assist 🤔|Non powered camp sites mainly all flood as there is plenty of compacted ground in sections which causes severe pooling.|So if it’s sunny, warm and summer - this place is great and we highly recommend.|If there is bad weather on the radar and you’re not in a van or cabin suggest you reconsider as this park seems to not worry about the safety of their guests at all and aren’t willing to assist anyone that needs help.|In summary… if you worry about safety, this isn’t the park for you. If you are self sufficient and can manage anything and everything alone then we highly recommend.

The park is great! 10 min walk to the beach via a track, however well worth it for slightly older kids.

Good facilities although not cleaned anywhere near enough.

Lots of interesting wildlife who are used to people - lace monitors, ducks, possums, kookaburras which will let you get super close.

Kitchens have all the power points locked sooo if you want to plug something in, BYO power source.

Staff are great, until you need help from falling trees, monsoon rains and/or bad weather.

People are left to their own devices with fires which is also scary to watch!
Real potential for a novice with fires to cause some serious damage and safety risk to other guests.

They don’t bother to check on anyone or render assistance when needed even when asked for help in horrific weather.

Sadly we were the only ones actively helping people who’s tents had collapsed - one younger reception staff member RUINED it for all the super friendly and kind staff the park had.

Shout out to the cafe staff who did an amazing job being kind, gentle and friendly at a time the guests needed a smiling face and some kindness.

Park floods badly, cars and vans bogged everywhere and the staffs response is “stay safe” we can’t assist 🤔

Non powered camp sites mainly all flood as there is plenty of compacted ground in sections which causes severe pooling.

So if it’s sunny, warm and summer - this place is great and we highly recommend.

If there is bad weather on the radar and you’re not in a van or cabin suggest you reconsider as this park seems to not worry about the safety of their guests at all and aren’t willing to assist anyone that needs help.

In summary… if you worry about safety, this isn’t the park for you. If you are self sufficient and can manage anything and everything alone then we highly recommend.

“Absolutely amazing place to camp! So many fun things for the kids to do — they had a blast! Even though our original site was muddy from the rain, the incredible staff (especially Mark!) went above and beyond to help us find a better spot and made the whole process so easy. Everyone was so friendly and helpful. We had such a great experience and can’t wait to come back!”

100% one of my favourite parks for off grid camping,  massive spots to setup, enough room for a camper,  gazebo, awning as well as the car. We went over the Anzac long weekend,  very busy,  but all the kids and parents were well behaved. It had obviously rained before we got there and bucketed down one night while we were there,  so a bit of a muddy mess, which leads me to the only negative.... the toilet/shower nearest to the camp kitchen was absolutely disgusting, so we ended up tracking the extra 2mins to the main block,  which were in much better condition.

All in all,  a great experience,  all other amenities well maintained.  Will 100% be back again.

Stayed here a few times. First time was great, second time not so much. First I got abused by the groundskeeper for being 25mm into the next camp zone due to me having to park my camper trailer over the mud not the gravel
So our area wasn’t in the mud. Then we had a caravan pull in next to us with a water leak that flooded our area. We spoke to the groundskeeper to be told it’s just the caravans overflow and there’s nothing we could do. So we packed up early and left. The staff are friendly and it’s a great place but old mate with the beard needs a good smack in the mouth.

Never again. First and last time here. The noisiest caravan park I've ever experienced in my life! Music pumping until 2am and no one did anything about it. No sleep, no enjoyment. Horrible experience. It was a waste of precious family holiday time here.

Excellent. Kids loved it. Parents loved it. Fantastic pool area with splash slide and Bouncing area. There was a Cafe with kids play and food was great, could also get a beer. Fun dune walk to a scenic beach spot and next door to the koala sanctuary. Accommodation was clean and modern and staff were very helpful. Quick car rides to local areas will come again.

Lovely place, great value for money, has a nice cafe and bar, resort type pool and spa.My family enjoyed camping here, camp kitchen would benefit with a bigger fridge and stove facility.Staff was very friendly and helpful, thanks team at Middle Rock.

What a great spot, thought we would get away for a couple of nights at short notice, stayed out the back with no power, typically nicer areas than powered sites. Water is available around the area to use.
Short walk over the dunes to the beach.
Camp kitchen is clean tidy and has plenty of area and appliances for use.
Pool area is large and looks new, resteraunt and bar over looking the pool.
People are friendly enough.
Will be back.

10/10, travelling in a van nice to stop and just relax we found this place and always will be coming back. Amazing service at the front desk so friendly and giving great assistance so lovely!! Cleanest bathrooms always a plus, In their no powered site had a beautiful backdrop of the gardens with the goannas just wondering past and with beautiful native birds. Couldn’t sell this place to you enough but with a love of dogs it’s a dog friendly park on leashes at all times with owners but who wouldn’t want to take their furry friends on an adventure as well. Beach access over a sand dune great walk to the beautiful one mile beach suggest to walk in afternoon nice and cool and to get a pretty sunset on the way back. Thank you again for a wonderful stay be back soon!!

We had an Ensuite site & it was fantastic the facilities are 10/10 this park is awesome for couples or families with all age children from small to teenagers. We 100% will book again when we re-visit NSW…..hoping to maybe do an extended family trip in a couple of years
Pleasant place to stay! Luke, the park manager, was an absolute legend. Extremely nice and helpful when our DVD player wasn’t working. He arrived very promptly and solved all our problems.

My review is just to say a massive thank you to Ingenia Middle Rock for refunding my family after a natural disaster (wild storms went through Port Stephens in January) and they promptly refunded us no questions asked. I will definitely rebook due to the incredible service we reserved in a crappy situation!

Me,My Mum and My 8 year old Brother Had Fun And Ingenia Holidays Middle Rock. I Had fun at The Shark And Rays I Also Had Fun at The Koala Place. I Had Fun at The Pool It Is Blast There. I Also Got Extra Night at There Because The Spa In The Spa Cabin Pump Need it To Get Fixed. i will Give This place a 5 stars. Also Give This Place A 5 stars Because They Give us Free upgrade cabin hope I will come back.

Hired 3 bedrooms town houses, thought it has 2 bathrooms but it was disappointing that it had only one bathroom that has no lock. Sharing with a friend was really hard to manage privacy. Faulty bbq machine in the balcony, almost got us burnt. Staff were friendly and supportive. But definitely they need to work on building maintenance.

Best stay here at Middle Rock. The staff are friendly and always accommodating. The facilities were clean and always well maintained. The cabins were also top notch cleaned. Cannot find any fault with this Holiday Park. Our second stay here and many more to come for me and my family. We had Christmas here few weeks ago and had plenty of space under the double carport that I shared with my sister. We were in Cabin 39 which was the perfect spot for everything eg. The cafe, pool and jumping pillow. Thank you so much to the beautiful staff, Hannah & Justine to name a few. Beautiful ladies Beautiful Park 100/100

Loved this place so much, should know this earlier, we made memories with the kids, large pool, with heated plunge pool and local restaurant available on site. A bit far if you walk to the local samurai beach, but accessible if you have 4WD. Just few minutes drive to the shopping centre. Just next to the Koala Hospital. Will definitely come back.

Do not stay here. Misleading advertising. There's no cafe/restaurant half of the week (for our entire stay). Beach access is not accurate...it's. 15 minute walk on soft sand...so with 3 young kids, this is not ideal.

Pool was also full with a large group of people - it was actually over full. Our family were not even able to find a tiny spot to get in. Staff advised the same large group book every year at the same time and take up the pool all day every day for their stay...yet we were not warned of this upon booking.

Absolute thieves. We raised with management and are told "too bad". Will be raising with fair trading if we do not receive a reasonable resolution.

Very cramped camping space
Dont recommend it if looking for some peace and quiet
Nice place. Helpful staff.
Good spot to stay and family friendly.

I don’t know about the “rooms” as I have a caravan but the sites are plenty big enough for my ‘van, with the awning extended, and my car. The office staff are friendly and helpful, the facilities are getting tired but still good. The location, just behind the beach is perfect (for me) I extended my stay twice, what more can I say.

공원전망 캐빈을 이용하였다. 2층 침대와 더블 침대가 준비 되어 있으며, 그 밖에 전자레인지, 냉장고, 식탁, 수세미, 주방세제, 식기류 등 생활에 필요한 시설을 갖추고 있다 (오븐은 없음). 객실은 매우 청결하였다. 부대 시설로 수영장이 운영되었고(11월 중순), 실외 바베큐(가스 철판), 세탁실(카드 결제 가능) 등이 있다. 근처 해변까지 도보로 약 15분 걸린다.
리셉션 데스크가 문 닫는 이후에 도착한다면 문자메시지를 통한 사전 안내에 따라 셀프체크인이 가능하다.
Amazing service by Britny and her team! Highly recommend this place!
住了2晚,車子就泊在旁邊,十分方便,環境舒適有渡假感覺,房子空間足夠及廚房設施用品十分充足,洗衣房就在附近,有機會會再來渡假
We absolutely love this park, we visit enough that my daughters have made friends with the onsite kids.
Beautiful stay in the 3 bed cabin. The management staff were so lovely accommodating our needs. Highly recommended.

Overall a great experience,  front of house staff very polite and extremely easy to deal with

Grounds people were very willing to help with directions and so very polite

Would recommend this place
Great location , great place to stay and visit staff is very friendly and happy to help all you need for a nice trip away for some much needed R&R

Most horrible experience at caravan park.
Toilets are disgusting, the cleaner had main toilet blocked for 2 hours 7:30-9:30 found later she was video chatting to someone. Other toilet had feces all over floor.
The cafe was overpriced and when asked for a glass of water, told I need to buy something first.
The place has a horrible atmosphere.

Had a brilliant time swagging at Middle Rock. We were so impressed by how affordable it was. The toilets and showers were well kept and pleasant to use. The kitchen area was extensive and had everything for a comfy stay (including a kettle and toaster!).

The pool area was lovely and there was even a bar/cafe next to it. There's a gorgeous beach with massive sand dunes just 10 minutes walk away. We also enjoyed all the native bird life around the park, including some beautiful Kookaburras and Sacred Kingfishers!
Nice stay. Loved it.

Our family loved this Holiday Park so much the first time, we decided to come back. We booked a two bedroom spa cabin. The Spa is huge and deep, perfect for a late night soak. Beds are a little too soft but otherwise comfortable.
The pool area, although backing onto the main road is stunning. The summer tunes playing in background make you feel like your walking around Wet and Wild or Wonderland and adds to the happy vibes. I would like to see pool side lounges that can be adjusted though.
The only negative is the restaurant. Different management from our first visit. We waited patiently to order food from the pool side. We could see they had a few other guests ordering from inside. That's no problem. The chef (owner possibly) took orders, while he instructed 1 other staff member to make coffees. After taking other guests orders, he walked off to start cooking and ignored us. I guess he felt under the pump with 2 tables. The lack of acknowledgement was straight up rude. A simple "hi folks, sorry to keep you waiting, but we'll be with you shortly." But we got nothing. The previous owners were friendly, offered happy hour, frozen drinks, and a much larger menu. Such a shame to see it change hands.
Location is fantastic, short drive to Nelson bay and next to 4x4 tracks. Great Thai and burgers in Anna Bay.
The room was nice!! Very clean with comfortable mattresses. However, unable to shower the night of check in due to no hot water with the same issue the following morning in regards to showering.

I just spent a great few days here beach fishing with my son. The rooms are warm and comfortable,  beds were great and the location is perfect. The 4wd entrance to Samurai beach is literally next door and Stockton is less than 10 mins down the road.
Will definitely be back
Hotel was good 👍

A very relaxing stay! The cabin was very spacious with a very comfortable bed. Excellent facilities on offer around the holiday park. Great location. Very friendly and professional staff. Highly recommend.

We really enjoyed our stay here. |We had an en-suite site and couldn’t believe it when we found a $0 washing machine in there!! …they even provided packets of washing detergent!! On the side of the en-suite was a private fold out clothes line. Towels and toiletries were also provided. Such unexpected luxury!!|The grounds are beautiful, the further back you go towards the back of the park are the unpowered sites, surrounded by natural bush and a couple of communal fire pits all stocked with firewood. |There is a walking track at the back which leads to a beautiful beach surrounded by sand dunes. |The front of the park is like a holiday resort with gorgeous swimming pools (too cold while we were there) and a bar and restaurant where we had cocktails and a very nice meal. |The staff were great!!… very friendly… I would certainly come back to stay. Highly recommend.

the park was very good to stay at. Close to most things and even a cafeteria. The most disappointing was they advertised a spa but spa was not working.  The excuse was that it was being fixed. I have heard this excuse before, so didn't wash with me. I believe it is false advertising. To me, this was the biggest disappointment and may stop me from staying here again.

The queen bed is very comfortable, but the single bed mattress is extremely hard. I was tossing and turning all night. The nearby cafe is convenient, but not great food and a pretty long wait. The place itself is pretty far from the main road, so it was a big detour to get to in the first place.
Great location, right next to Koala sanctuary. Good facilities & helpful service.
It’s clean and very good location.

My wife, 2 older grandsons (7 & 11) and I met up with our daughter/son IL and grandson last week at Middle Rock. We were in our motorhome, others in a cabin opposite. Kids had a blast. Very relaxing. Staff very helpful & obliging. A special compliment to the young team member with the blond hair whose name I cannot recall. Very polite, patient, helpful and personable. Staff like her are gold.
Nice place to stay. The only thing I noticed was that the cleanliness wasn't good enough to get 5 stars.

Awesome park, kids loved it. Fantastic pool area and the heated spa pool was a real winner.
Live music around the pool and free kids activities on during the school holidays. Stayed in a 2bed villa and have everything we needed.

Writing this review as we return home from our short trip to Port Stephens. We stayed here at Ingenia Middle Rock. Super quick check-in process online so once we stepped into reception upon arrival, greeted ladies at reception, paid the outstanding bal and received  cabin keys. Smooth n Easy! Loved our bottlebrush cabin. Clean on arrival. Took us a while to figure out how to work the stove only to notice the cooking appliances needed stainless steel bottoms. Once it worked, those electric stoves heat up soooo quick. The cabin comes with:
- Small Pot
- frying pan
- plates (incl plastic)
- Large salad bowl
- Cutlery
-Bbq utensils (small table gas bbq on front shelter)
-Drinking cups
- Iron board and iron
- hair dryer
-Washing machine & dryer (we used both, worked fine)
-Towels, shampoo, conditioner
-Duvet, pillows, bed sheets

Pool and Spa kept clean, an absolute pleasure after an action-packed day and you just want to unwind. We can see ourselves returning to this wonderful accomodation park for sure.

Thank you.

I’m not sure how this place got such a high overall rating. I found this place odd. It was also very noisy in the morning with what sounded like workmen with loud strimmers going at it from very early in the morning. Not what you want on your holiday. Perhaps we were just unlucky.

NO DISABLED TOILETS OR SHOWERS. Was told no dogs during busy time however so many dogs around. Just not consistent. Friendly staff. Though every facilty/ caravan park  had to have some sort of disabled toilets, parking and showers.

Location wise is great - near the beach, koala sanctuary, and other interesting places to see.

The room is a little bit tight, especially the shower/toilet. Need to squeeze if you're big and tall like my husband.

There's an aircon and each room ( we've got 2 rooms) have an electric fan -  dusty unfortunately :( .

Spacious verandah, which is a +

Was a little disappointed as when we needed to use the stove- lighter wasn't available :(

We recently stayed on a powered site in the grassed area of the park and it was fantastic. We had a large level site with a great outlook, plenty of shade and privacy. Amenities were clean and the grounds were well looked after. We stayed for 4 days and regularly saw staff attending to the park for different things. Reception staff were friendly and our whole experience was amazing. Would recommend to anyone looking for a family friendly park and we will happily return. Not a huge fan of the two resident goannas but they seemed to do their own thing if left alone and I guess that’s what you can expect being so close to nature!

I stayed here the weekend just gone.It's a nice place,easy to get to the beach if you can walk for 5 minutes.The glass door on the cabin wouldn't lock,and the fans were very dusty.As was the top of the shower curtain.I cleaned these myself.Ingenia we are not all 5ft tall,i always see these areas uncleaned in cabins.The oven being a gas one,wouldn't light as the ignition wouldn't spark.Otherwise it was good,and the reception ladies on arrival were 10/10.Ingenia always have excellent staff and these were no exception,Thank you reception ladies.4/5 in total

Fantastic Caravan Park. We do love its location, with walking tracks to the beach.
This was our second time staying here, first time with our camper trailer. We love the experiences that come with camping; the neighbours, the wildlife, the pool, the access to amenities.
We will definitely be returning campers.
Such a great place to stay for families with young children. The beach is perfection and the park amenities are some of the best in the area.
Loved staying here, the reception was really helpful and welcoming. The cabin was clean, also had all amenities and right next to the beach. Would definitely recommend
Can definitely recommend the Bottle Brush Cabins!
AWESOME PLACE would recommend for kids and family as there is camping grounds, cabins and a caravan park. There is even a place where people stay for annuall time
Loved it great place to have a holuday and very nice people the weather was amazing

Check in and check out was fine. The staff I interacted with were friendly and it was easy to find the cabin. It’s a bit downhill from here as the cabin was in a condition where further cleaning was needed just so we could use the facilities. I’m not sure why the second bedroom was not made up as the sheets were just laid out on the bed which had copious amounts of dead ants scattered. This room clearly had an ant problem as they kept crawling up the walls throughout our stay. I get it’s a cabin but there was clearly an infestation somewhere. We stayed 2 nights and paid $444 per night and when my friend asked for extra towels and toilet paper they asked us if we used this many towels at home and were also given one extra roll 🧻. The curtains don’t work (they don’t close fully or open fully). The floors were dirty and I wiped them down with wet wipes the minute we walked in. Access to beach is difficult on foot and by road (don’t bother if you don’t have a 4WD). The WIFI provided was abysmal and suffered with everyone on the network at the same time. Within 5 minutes of walking in, I regretted not booking the 2 bedroom Oaks for a similar price instead. We stayed because we were going to be out on all the days anyway and just needed a place to sleep but honestly I wouldn’t book again. This place looks great on the booking sites but needs a refresh and a deep clean especially if charging over $400 per night - even if it’s peak season there are better options around.
You get free milk and I saw about 10 kookaburras here in one day.

Don't book the unpowered sites, they're terribly unlevel.... Super frustrating after a long day of driving when all you want to do is park up and go to sleep... Toilets/bathrooms aren't particularly clean either.

Great people and very friendly service. Loved the Cafe and pool area.
The cabin was very tired and quite dirty. Needs quite a bit of maintenance work and a spring clean.
Very uncomfortable in the heat.
Needs another air-conditioning unit downstairs to help cool that area.
No screens on the doors so we were unable to keep these open to let the breeze through.
Definitely need a makeover !
Not worth the price paid.

This place is really beautiful to stay for your vacation ! Highly recommend! My son really enjoyed!They have kids playground and pool , restaurant and a cafe! this is all in one ! the cabin are also nice everything you need is there ! Love to go back here again ! ❤️
Amazing place to stay with family. Very family friendly.

Einer der schönsten Campingplätze in ganz Australien!!! Die Temperaturen sind angenehm, direkter Zugang zum Strand sind vorhanden und die Küche sowie Waschräume sind sehr sauber. Nachts sind Possums unterwegs, deshalb ist es wichtig, Essen sicher aufzubewahren. Wir würden jederzeit wiederkommen!
Awesome place for family and kids. We use our caravan and have no issues

Loved this place! Clean n quiet.
The restaurant food was nice.
Very family friendly place.
The room was fantastic!

The park was picked by my daughter for her birthday so we just booked the room we wanted. Our cabin was nice but not a very big bedroom. Had some annoyance getting around the bed...too tight for us! Other than that, the park is great especially for families. We are in our late sixties with bad knees etc.. so didn't go to the beach as it was too much of a walk for us. The pool area and restaurant was great. The food was very good with reasonable prices. Staff are very lovely and helpful. The park is close to Anna Bay and Nelson Bay shops. If we returned we would choose a different cabin. Highly recommend for families with small children.

Piccolo campeggio con piazzole e case mobili, vicino al Koala Santuary. Dopo una passeggiata si arriva alle dune di sabbia di Anna Bay. La casa mobile era ben accessoriata e pulita. 2 giorni tranquilli a parte il frigo un po’ rumoroso. Campeggio con zone attrezzate di aree pic nic (barbeque) molto efficienti.
Lovely staff and great location
Lovely pools , cafe , restaurant is give a 2 it’s terrible food , except for hot chips 🍟
Terrific caravan park!!
A well priced and delightful campground. The arrangement for our late night arrival was excellent. A little disappointed that there were organised functions in the camp Kitchen on two occasions.
Loved the place, very clean, great location close to the beach, loved the cafe and pool and spa, great place- friendly staff
Great place to stay. Would definitely recommend this accommodation and stay with ingenia again
Loved our stay! Great facilities for families. Loved the onsite restaurant/cafe.

Have been staying at the park for many years. Recently however, it has become a haven for rowdy group parties, with no control over their feral kids, some of which on one weekend were running through campsites at 2.30am, with their parents passed out drunk. No security, instead they ask the poor groundsmen to come in and police the noise and drunks. Head office will just not employ security, leaving those running the park with no options. Its sad I have to make this review because we love the place.
It was a nice caravan park
The young lady at the front desk was super helpful and sorted everything out that i needed.

Accueil chaleureux comme souvent en Australie,  le camping était pas plein nous avons eu un super emplacement.
Voulant réserver à l ingenia de byron bay le site marchait pas et avec notre petit niveau d anglais,  liza de l accueil à téléphone à ses collègues pour nous , merci encore liza , notre road trip touche à sa fin nous garderons un bon souvenir de Anna bay et des kookaburra voleur de pain 🍞 😅
Daniel

We organised 70 of our family and friends to stay at Middle Rock for my husbands 70th birthday. We stayed 5 nights and I can’t speak more highly of this fantastic park in a beautiful area with friendly very helpful staff. Special thanks to Justine and Luke
Love this place, such a family friendly place, and the walk to the beach through the sand dunes just wow
三日間だけの滞在でしたがとても快適に過ごす方ができました！wifiが弱いとWebサイトに書いてありましたが、何の心配もなく使う方ができました。部屋も綺麗で掃除が行き届いていました。ありがとうございました！
Beautiful spot, great for kids

It's really a place to live
I have been here for 8 years
Almost 9 years
I live in the Home Village along with people on 73 homes
My family had a great stay, the cabin was amazing with everything we needed, we enjoyed the park facilities.

Extremely well maintained park with all the facilities you could ever want! Pools are fun and kept clean, on-site restaurant has great coffee, cocktails and food. The park grounds and amenities are maintained well and the Paperbark cabins are five star luxury.
Excellent for families and location, wifi was terrific
Very good location few hours from Sydney... Close to all the main spots more importantly close to each with an amazing view of the sunrise

We stayed here twice before, once in a cabin and once on a powered campsite. This review is in regard to the powered campsite. Booking and check-in was easy with staff being very friendly and helpful. The whole site is clean and well maintained, including the toilets, showers and amenities. Our campsite was fairly spacious with some shade from overhanging trees. The ground was clean and level. Power to the site was reliable which made our stay much more comfortable. The bbq was very clean and is cleaned daily. At night it was fairly peaceful except form some rowdy kids, which was expected during the school holiday period. At night, also expect some friendly locals to visit (possum and wallaby) but make sure food and rubbish are secure or expect a bit of a mess. Overall it was an enjoyable stay and we would not hesitate in coming back or recommending this place to anyone.
Holiday resort adjacent to the beach with a selection of cabins and camp spots. Nice pool and cafe for the kids, very friendly and brand new toilet facilities.

We stayed on an ensuite tent sites. The ensuite was very clean and well maintained. The caravan park has a lovely pool area and heated spa pool, which was fantastic because it's not quite summer yet and the restaurant and bar onsite was also lovely to have. A really great stay and great location. Would highly recommend for anyone to choose this place to stay. Also, the park managers were very flexible and accommodating. Really lovely people!

Our cabin was beautiful.  It was clean and spacious.  Lots of tea & coffee etc...
Plenty of space for our two furbabies to wander. We had an awesome sleep in a comfortable bed. Staff were great, one young lady in particular. She was helpful, friendly & happy to assist in anyway
Very enjoyable stay, clean, friendly staff, great location and facilities for the whole family
Very nice accommodation

The caravan park is very well maintained which is why it got three stars and not lower. I asked for an easy site to get into and got one of the hardest but arriving at the park and even though my booking had dogs and I then mentioned it the reception staff’s attitude changed. It was like I should be grateful to actually stay there when I had a choice of places at Port Stephens that was pet friendly during July school holidays. I was told a few times in various ways that they don’t normally take dogs during holidays and it was like they were doing me a favour. This was despite in the powered site section there was only about three caravans.

Kids from the annual sites would run around screaming and how you didn’t get hit by them on their scooters or bikes is amazing at times.

The park is lovely but the first impression I got from reception wasn’t good.

There are many parks in Port Stephens area that a pet friendly even in school holidays that you can choose from I think the reception staff need to remember that
Amazing cabin, facilities and staff. Loved our trip
It was a wonderful experience

Great holiday park, we took the camper trailer and stayed near the playground which gave the kids plenty to do.
You can have a fire in winter too, which is a bonus, will definitely be back.
The staff are awesome, there to help with whatever.
Had a great two night stay here during winter school holidays. We enjoyed the quad bike and sandboarding near the beach. Facilities and rooms were clean.
Thoroughly enjoyed our stay vacation! Grandkids had the best time and Nanny got to chill also.

Great place to visit loved the location next to the beach
Would recomend to any to stay at the park
Nice place, had a really good time there, I recommend this place.

Personally, i found it was overrated holiday park, i have 3 kids under 8 yrs old, no activities for kids, swimming pool is not heated, heated spa only but small for a group booking. and expensive. Not for me

Great park! Very friendly staff. Park is clean and well maintained. Sites are big and the park is really quiet. It’s so nice to see and hear all the birds, possums and koalas. Our kids are having a great time. First place we have been to where the wifi actually works. There’s lots to see and do near by. We will definitely be coming back here regularly.
this place has amazing serivce

Loved staying here we will definitely be back. cabins may look small but were very spacious inside and they are cleanly and have everything you need. Beach is only 10/15 minutes away (walking). Kids activities for all ages.
Booked 2 sites for long weekend, on arrival we were told the allocated sites were not available as cabins were being built on them and we were put on muddy sites with no sun on either site

Short notice getaway, the team at reception were very accommodating and very friendly at checkin. ||Nice large sites, was warned it could be tight to get the van in but was easy as. ||Tractor service available is needed. ||Clean toilets and showers with good water pressure.

Loved the villa cabin very spacious and clean. Beach was a hike but we enjoyed it. Vending machines, cafe/restaurant, laundry available on site which was extremely handy. Multiple pools plenty of seating by pool or in park on sites. BBQ area was good. Overall we enjoyed our stay.
Excellent service and value
